016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.services;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.AddressParser;
022import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
023import org.bitcoinj.base.Network;
024import org.bitcoinj.base.ScriptType;
025import org.bitcoinj.core.Context;
026import org.bitcoinj.core.InsufficientMoneyException;
027import org.bitcoinj.core.ProtocolException;
028import org.bitcoinj.core.ProtocolVersion;
029import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionBroadcast;
030import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionOutput;
031import org.bitcoinj.core.VerificationException;
032import org.bitcoinj.crypto.DeterministicKey;
033import org.bitcoinj.script.Script;
034import org.bitcoinj.script.ScriptBuilder;
035import org.bitcoinj.wallet.KeyChain;
036import org.bitcoinj.wallet.KeyChainGroupStructure;
037import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.conversion.HexUtil;
038import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.conversion.RpcServerModule;
039import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.BlockChainInfo;
040import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.BlockInfo;
041import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.NetworkInfo;
042import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.SignedRawTransaction;
043import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.UnspentOutput;
044import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.rpc.BitcoinJsonRpc;
045import org.bitcoinj.core.AbstractBlockChain;
046import org.bitcoinj.core.Block;
047import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
048import org.bitcoinj.core.PeerGroup;
049import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
050import org.bitcoinj.core.StoredBlock;
051import org.bitcoinj.core.Transaction;
052import org.bitcoinj.kits.WalletAppKit;
053import org.bitcoinj.store.BlockStoreException;
054import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.RawTransactionSigningRequest;
055import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.SigningRequest;
056import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionInputData;
057import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionOutputData;
058import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionOutputDataScript;
059import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcShutdownService;
060import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection.AbstractJsonRpcService;
061import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection.JsonRpcServiceWrapper;
062import org.slf4j.Logger;
063import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
064
065import jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct;
066import jakarta.annotation.PreDestroy;
067import jakarta.inject.Inject;
068
069import java.io.File;
070import java.io.IOException;
071import java.lang.reflect.Method;
072import java.math.BigDecimal;
073import java.nio.BufferUnderflowException;
074import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
075import java.nio.file.Files;
076import java.util.HexFormat;
077import java.util.List;
078import java.util.Map;
079import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
080import java.util.stream.Collectors;
081
082/**
083 * Implement a subset of Bitcoin JSON RPC using a WalletAppKit
084 */
085public class WalletAppKitService extends AbstractJsonRpcService implements BitcoinJsonRpc {
086    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(WalletAppKitService.class);
087    private static final Map<String, Method> methods = JsonRpcServiceWrapper.reflect(WalletAppKitService.class);
088    // P2P user-agent string
089    private static final String userAgentName = "WalletAppKitService";
090    // P2P user-agent version
091    private static final String appVersion = "0.1";
092    // server version, placeholder for now (returned in `getnetworkinfo`)
093    private static final int version = 1;
094    private static final String helpString = """
095== Blockchain ==
096getbestblockhash
097getblock hash verbosity(0,1,2)
098getblockchaininfo
099getblockcount
100getblockhash height [TBD]
101getblockheader hash verbose(boolean)
102
103== Control ==
104help
105stop
106
107== Network ==
108getconnectioncount
109getnetworkinfo
110
111== Rawtransactions ==
112createrawtransaction [{"txid":"hex","vout":n},...] [{"address":amount},...]
113sendrawtransaction hex
114
115== Wallet ==
116getbalance
117getnewaddress
118listunspent minConf maxConf addresses include-unsafe
119sendtoaddress address amount
120signrawtransactionwithwallet hex
121""";
122
123    protected final HexFormat hexFormat = HexFormat.of();
124
125    private final JsonRpcShutdownService jsonRpcShutdownService;
126    protected final BitcoinNetwork network;
127    protected final WalletAppKit kit;
128    protected final ObjectMapper mapper;
129
130    /* Dummy fields for JSON RPC responses TODO: Implement them */
131    private int timeOffset = 0;
132    private BigDecimal difficulty = new BigDecimal(0);
133    private BigDecimal verificationProgress = new BigDecimal(0);
134    private byte[] chainWork = new byte[]{0x00, 0x00};
135
136    private static final AddressParser parser = AddressParser.getDefault();
137    private WalletSigningService signingService;
138
139    /**
140     * Create an instance in a temporary directory. Useful for testing.
141     * @param network network to operate on
142     * @param scriptType script type for wallet
143     * @param walletBaseName base name for the two wallet files
144     * @return an un-started instance (use {@link #start()} to start it)
145     */
146    public static WalletAppKitService createTemporary(BitcoinNetwork network, ScriptType scriptType, String walletBaseName) {
147        WalletAppKit walletAppKit = createTemporaryWallet(network, scriptType, walletBaseName);
148        return new WalletAppKitService(walletAppKit, new JsonRpcShutdownService.NoopShutdownService());
149    }
150
151    public static WalletAppKit createTemporaryWallet(BitcoinNetwork network, ScriptType scriptType, String walletBaseName) {
152        Context.propagate(new Context());
153        String filePrefix = walletBaseName + "-" + network;
154        File dataDirectory = null;
155        try {
156            dataDirectory = Files.createTempDirectory(walletBaseName).toFile();
157        } catch (IOException e) {
158            throw new RuntimeException(e);
159        }
160        log.info("Returning WalletAppKit bean, wallet directory: {}, prefix: {}", dataDirectory.getAbsolutePath(), filePrefix);
161        return new WalletAppKit(network, scriptType, KeyChainGroupStructure.BIP43, dataDirectory, filePrefix);
162    }
163
164    /**
165     * Construct from an (un-started) {@link WalletAppKit} instance.
166     * @param walletAppKit instance
167     */
168    @Inject
169    public WalletAppKitService(WalletAppKit walletAppKit, JsonRpcShutdownService jsonRpcShutdownService) {
170        super(methods);
171        kit = walletAppKit;
172        this.jsonRpcShutdownService = jsonRpcShutdownService;
173        network = kit.network();
174        mapper = new ObjectMapper();
175        mapper.registerModule(new RpcServerModule());
176    }
177
178    @PostConstruct
179    public void start() {
180        log.info("WalletAppKitService.start()");
181        kit.setUserAgent(userAgentName, appVersion);
182        kit.setBlockingStartup(false);  // `false` means startup is complete when network activity begins
183        kit.startAsync();
184        kit.awaitRunning();
185        signingService = new WalletSigningService(kit.wallet());
186    }
187
188    public Network network() {
189        return this.network;
190    }
191
192    public PeerGroup getPeerGroup() {
193        kit.awaitRunning();
194        return kit.peerGroup();
195    }
196
197    @Override
198    public CompletableFuture<String> help() {
199        return result(helpString);
200    }
201
202    /**
203     * Initiate server shutdown. This is a JSON-RPC method and will initiate but not
204     * complete server-shutdown because it must return a response to the client.
205     * This will call {@link JsonRpcShutdownService#stopServer()} on the {@link JsonRpcShutdownService}
206     * instance that was constructor-injected.
207     * @return A status string indicating the server is stopping
208     */
209    @Override
210    public CompletableFuture<String> stop() {
211        log.info("stop");
212        String message = jsonRpcShutdownService.stopServer();
213        return result(message);
214    }
215
216    @Override
217    public CompletableFuture<Integer> getblockcount() {
218        log.info("getblockcount");
219        if(!kit.isRunning()) {
220            String state = kit.state().toString();
221            log.warn("WalletAppKit not running, state: {}", state);
222            return exception(new RuntimeException("WalletAppKit not running, state: " + state));
223        }
224        return result(kit.chain().getChainHead().getHeight());
225    }
226
227    @Override
228    public CompletableFuture<Sha256Hash> getbestblockhash() {
229        log.info("getbestblockhash");
230        if(!kit.isRunning()) {
231            log.warn("kit not running, returning null");
232            return null;
233        }
234        return result(kit.chain().getChainHead().getHeader().getHash());
235    }
236
237    @Override
238    public CompletableFuture<JsonNode> getblockheader(String blockHashString, Boolean verbose) {
239        return getblockheader2(Sha256Hash.wrap(blockHashString), verbose);
240    }
241
242    public CompletableFuture<JsonNode> getblockheader2(Sha256Hash blockHash, Boolean verbose) {
243        if (verbose == null || verbose) {
244            return getBlockInfo(blockHash, BlockInfo.IncludeTxFlag.NO)
245                    .thenApply(mapper::valueToTree);
246        } else {
247            return getBlockBytes(blockHash)
248                    .thenApply(HexUtil::bytesToHexString)
249                    .thenApply(mapper::valueToTree);
250        }
251    }
252
253    /**
254     * Partial implementation of `getblock`
255     *
256     * In the case where verbosity = 0, a block is returned without transactions (which is incorrect)
257     * For verbosity = 1, we return a BlockInfo, but some fields may be missing or incorrect, including a list of TXIDs
258     * For verbosity = 2, we are currently throwing an exception.
259     * 
260     * @param blockHashString The hash of the block we are to return (as hex)
261     * @param verbosity Specifies the format to return (currently only `1` halfway works)
262     * @return Either a `Block` or `BlockInfo` depending upon verbosity.
263     */
264    @Override
265    public CompletableFuture<JsonNode> getblock(String blockHashString, Integer verbosity) {
266        return getblock2(Sha256Hash.wrap(blockHashString), verbosity);
267    }
268
269    public CompletableFuture<JsonNode> getblock2(Sha256Hash blockHash, Integer verbosity) {
270        int verbosityInt = verbosity != null ? verbosity : 1;
271        return (switch (verbosityInt) {
272            case 0 -> getBlockBytes(blockHash).thenApply(HexUtil::bytesToHexString);
273            case 1 -> getBlockInfo(blockHash, BlockInfo.IncludeTxFlag.IDONLY);
274            case 2 -> getBlockInfo(blockHash, BlockInfo.IncludeTxFlag.YES);
275            default -> exception(new IllegalArgumentException("Unknown verbosity parameter"));
276        }).thenApply(mapper::valueToTree);
277    }
278
279    /**
280     * Placeholder -- currently throws `UnsupportedOperationException`
281     * 
282     * @param blockNumber The block height of the desired block
283     * @return The Sha256Hash of the specified block
284     */
285    @Override
286    public CompletableFuture<Sha256Hash> getblockhash(Integer blockNumber) {
287        // TODO: Extend Blockchain/Blockstore so it can do this
288        return exception(new UnsupportedOperationException("Unimplemented RPC method"));
289    }
290
291    @Override
292    public CompletableFuture<Integer> getconnectioncount() {
293        if(!kit.isRunning()) {
294            return exception(new RuntimeException("Kit not running"));
295        }
296        try {
297            return result(kit.peerGroup().numConnectedPeers());
298        } catch (IllegalStateException ex) {
299            return exception(ex);
300        }
301    }
302
303    @Override
304    public CompletableFuture<BlockChainInfo> getblockchaininfo() {
305        return result(new BlockChainInfo(BlockChainInfo.networkToChainName(network),   // Chain ID
306                kit.chain().getChainHead().getHeight(),             // Block processed (same as headers for SPV)
307                kit.chain().getChainHead().getHeight(),             // Headers validated
308                kit.chain().getChainHead().getHeader().getHash(),   // Best block hash
309                difficulty,
310                verificationProgress,
311                chainWork));
312    }
313
314    @Override
315    public CompletableFuture<NetworkInfo> getnetworkinfo() {
316        byte[] localServices = {};
317        Object[] network = {};
318        Object[] address = {};
319        return result(new NetworkInfo(version,
320                "",
321                ProtocolVersion.CURRENT.intValue(),
322                timeOffset,
323                getconnectioncount().join(),
324                "proxy",
325                (int) Transaction.REFERENCE_DEFAULT_MIN_TX_FEE.getValue(),  // relayFee
326                localServices,
327                network,
328                address));
329    }
330
331    record outpoint(Sha256Hash txId, int vout) {
332        public outpoint(String idString, int vout) {
333            this(Sha256Hash.wrap(idString), vout);
334        }
335        public outpoint(Map<String, Object> json) {
336            this((String) json.get("txid"), ((Number) json.get("vout")).intValue());
337        }
338
339    }
340    record output(Address address, Coin amount) {
341        public output(String addString, String amountString) {
342            this(parser.parseAddress(addString),  Coin.parseCoin(amountString));
343        }
344        Script script() {
345            return ScriptBuilder.createP2PKHOutputScript(this.address().getHash());
346        }
347    }
348
349    @Override
350    public CompletableFuture<String> createrawtransaction(List<Map<String, Object>> inputs, List<Map<String, String>> outputs) {
351        try {
352            List<TransactionInputData> ins = inputs.stream()
353                    .map(outpoint::new)
354                    .flatMap(op -> signingService.findUnspentOutput(op.txId, op.vout).stream())
355                    .map(TransactionInputData::fromTxOut)
356                    .toList();
357            List<? extends TransactionOutputData> outs = outputs.stream()
358                    .flatMap(map -> map.entrySet().stream())
359                    .map(entry -> new output(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue()))
360                    .map(o -> new TransactionOutputDataScript(o.amount(), o.script()))
361                    .toList();
362            // TODO: Add a change output?
363            SigningRequest sr = SigningRequest.of(ins, (List<TransactionOutputData>) outs);
364            Transaction rawTx = sr.toUnsignedTransaction();
365            return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(HexFormat.of().formatHex(rawTx.serialize()));
366        } catch (Throwable t) {
367            return CompletableFuture.failedFuture(t);
368        }
369    }
370
371    @Override
372    public CompletableFuture<Address> getnewaddress() {
373        DeterministicKey key = kit.wallet().getActiveKeyChain().getKey(KeyChain.KeyPurpose.RECEIVE_FUNDS);
374        Address address = key.toAddress(ScriptType.P2PKH, network);
375        log.warn("address {} key path: {}", address, key.getPathAsString());
376        return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(address);
377    }
378
379    @Override
380    public CompletableFuture<Coin> getbalance() {
381        return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(kit.wallet().getBalance());
382    }
383
384    @Override
385    public CompletableFuture<List<UnspentOutput>> listunspent(Integer minConf, Integer maxConf, List<String> addresses, Boolean includeUnsafe) {
386        List<Address> addressList = addresses != null
387                ? addresses.stream().map(parser::parseAddress).toList()
388                : List.of();
389        List<TransactionOutput> outs = signingService.findUnspentOutputs(
390                                            minConf != null ? minConf : DEFAULT_MIN_CONF,
391                                            maxConf != null ? maxConf : DEFAULT_MAX_CONF,
392                                            addressList);
393        List<UnspentOutput> unspents = outs.stream()
394                .map(out -> new UnspentOutput(
395                        out.getParentTransactionHash(),
396                        out.getIndex(),
397                        null, // Address (get from script?)
398                        "", // label
399                        hexFormat.formatHex(out.getScriptPubKey().program()), // scriptPubKey
400                        out.getValue(),     // amount
401                        out.getParentTransactionDepthInBlocks(),  // confirmations
402                        null,   // redeemScript
403                        null,   // witnessScript
404                        true,   // spendable
405                        true,   // solvable
406                        "description",  // description
407                        true)   // safe
408                )
409                .toList();
410        return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(unspents);
411    }
412
413    /**
414     * Send coins to an address
415     * @param toAddressString Address to send coins to
416     * @param amountDouble Amount to send
417     * @return future that completes with a transaction hash/id when the tx is successfully relayed
418     */
419    @Override
420    public CompletableFuture<Sha256Hash> sendtoaddress(String toAddressString, Double amountDouble) {
421        log.info("sendtoaddress {}, {}", toAddressString, amountDouble);
422        Address toAddress = parser.parseAddress(toAddressString);
423        Coin amount = Coin.ofBtc(BigDecimal.valueOf(amountDouble));
424        Transaction signedTx;
425        try {
426            signedTx = signingService.signSendToAddress(toAddress, amount).join();
427        } catch (IOException | InsufficientMoneyException e) {
428            return CompletableFuture.failedFuture(e);
429        }
430        return sendTransaction(signedTx)
431                .thenCompose(tb1 -> tb1.awaitRelayed()
432                        .thenApply(tb2 -> tb2.transaction()
433                                .getTxId()
434                        )
435                );
436    }
437
438    @Override
439    public CompletableFuture<Sha256Hash> sendrawtransaction(String hex) {
440        log.info("received raw tx: {}", hex);
441        ByteBuffer raw = ByteBuffer.wrap(hexFormat.parseHex(hex));
442        Transaction signedTx;
443        try {
444            signedTx = Transaction.read(raw);
445        } catch (ProtocolException pe) {
446            return CompletableFuture.failedFuture(new RuntimeException("Invalid raw (hex) transaction", pe));
447        }
448        log.info("received raw tx: {}", signedTx);
449        try {
450            Transaction.verify(network, signedTx);
451        } catch (VerificationException ve) {
452            // TODO: More validation?
453            return CompletableFuture.failedFuture(ve);
454        }
455        return sendTransaction(signedTx)
456                .whenComplete((bcast, error) -> {
457                    if (error != null) {
458                        log.info("Broadcast {}, done: {}", bcast.transaction().getTxId(), bcast.awaitSent().isDone());
459                    } else {
460                        log.error("", error);
461                    }
462                })
463                .thenCompose(tb1 -> tb1.awaitRelayed()
464                        .thenApply(tb2 -> tb2.transaction()
465                                .getTxId()
466                        )
467                );
468    }
469
470    /**
471     * @param hex hex-encoded unsigned raw transaction
472     * @return signed raw transaction
473     */
474    @Override
475    public CompletableFuture<SignedRawTransaction> signrawtransactionwithwallet(String hex) {
476        ByteBuffer raw = ByteBuffer.wrap(hexFormat.parseHex(hex));
477
478        RawTransactionSigningRequest signingRequest;
479        try {
480            Transaction unsignedTx = Transaction.read(raw);
481            log.info("received tx: {}", unsignedTx);
482            signingRequest = RawTransactionSigningRequest.ofTransaction(unsignedTx);
483        } catch (BufferUnderflowException | ProtocolException e) {
484            return CompletableFuture.failedFuture(new RuntimeException("Invalid raw (hex) transaction", e));
485        }
486
487        return signingService.signTransaction(signingRequest)
488                .thenApply(SignedRawTransaction::of);
489    }
490
491    private CompletableFuture<TransactionBroadcast> sendTransaction(Transaction tx) {
492        try {
493            log.info("committing tx to wallet: {}", tx);
494            kit.wallet().commitTx(tx);
495            log.info("broadcasting tx: {}", tx);
496            return kit.peerGroup().broadcastTransaction(tx).awaitSent();
497        } catch (Throwable t) {
498            return CompletableFuture.failedFuture(t);
499        }
500    }
501
502    private CompletableFuture<byte[]> getBlockBytes(Sha256Hash blockHash) {
503        // TODO: This block should have transactions
504        StoredBlock storedBlock;
505        try {
506            storedBlock = getStoredBlockByHash(kit.chain(), blockHash);
507        } catch (BlockStoreException e) {
508            return exception(e);
509        }
510        byte[] data = storedBlock.getHeader().serialize();
511        return result(data);
512    }
513
514    public CompletableFuture<BlockInfo> getBlockInfo(Sha256Hash blockHash, BlockInfo.IncludeTxFlag includeTx) {
515        BlockInfo blockInfo;
516        try {
517            blockInfo = getBlockInfoByHash(kit.chain(), blockHash, includeTx);
518            log.info("blockinfo: {}, {}", blockInfo.hash, blockInfo.height);
519        } catch (BlockStoreException e) {
520            return exception(e);
521        }
522        return result(blockInfo);
523    }
524
525    private static StoredBlock getStoredBlockByHash(AbstractBlockChain blockChain, Sha256Hash blockHash) throws BlockStoreException {
526        return blockChain.getBlockStore().get(blockHash);
527    }
528
529    /**
530     * Get a BlockInfo for the specified hash
531     *
532     * @param blockChain The blockchain object to pull the data from
533     * @param blockHash The hash of the desired block
534     * @param includeTx whether to include transactions (currently must be false)
535     * @return block information (currently incomplete and untested)
536     * @throws BlockStoreException Something went wrong
537     */
538    private static BlockInfo getBlockInfoByHash(AbstractBlockChain blockChain, Sha256Hash blockHash, BlockInfo.IncludeTxFlag includeTx) throws BlockStoreException {
539        if (includeTx == BlockInfo.IncludeTxFlag.YES) {
540            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Including transactions not supported yet");
541        }
542        StoredBlock block = getStoredBlockByHash(blockChain, blockHash);
543        Block header = block.getHeader();
544        int blockHeight = block.getHeight();
545        int confirmations = blockChain.getBestChainHeight() - blockHeight;
546        log.trace("building BlockInfo for hash: {} height: {}", blockHash, blockHeight);
547        return new BlockInfo(header.getHash(),
548                confirmations,
549                header.messageSize(),
550                blockHeight,
551                (int) header.getVersion(),
552                header.getMerkleRoot(),
553                -1,     // Unknown number of Transactions
554                (includeTx == BlockInfo.IncludeTxFlag.IDONLY) ? hashListFromTxList(header.getTransactions()) : null,
555                (int) header.time().getEpochSecond(),
556                header.getNonce(),
557                null, // TODO: Return "bits" here
558                new BigDecimal(header.getDifficultyTargetAsInteger()),  // TODO: Verify this is correct
559                block.getChainWork().toString(),
560                block.getPrev(blockChain.getBlockStore()).getHeader().getHash(),
561                null);  // TODO: Extend BlockStore to make this information retrievable
562    }
563
564    private static BlockInfo.Sha256HashList hashListFromTxList(List<Transaction> txList) {
565        if (txList == null) {
566            return null;
567        } else {
568            List<Sha256Hash> list = txList.stream()
569                    .map(Transaction::getTxId)
570                    .collect(Collectors.toList());
571            return new BlockInfo.Sha256HashList(list);
572        }
573    }
574
575    @Override
576    @PreDestroy
577    public void close() {
578        log.info("Closing WalletAppKit...");
579        kit.close();
580        log.info("WalletAppKit terminated");
581    }
582}
